name: White Chocolate Butter Cream Frosting
recipeInstructions:
1. Microwave white chocolate and cream in a medium bowl on high for 1 1/2 minutes or until the white chocolate is almost melted, stirring halfway through heating time.
2. Stir until the white chocolate is completely melted. Cool to room temperature.
3. Gradually beat butter and sugar into the cooled mixture on high speed until light and fluffy.
Makes enough to frost 2 9-inch cake layers.
